name: Herbal Dessert Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the heavy cream in a medium-sized, chilled bowl until soft peaks form.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients (grated lemon rind, ground ginger, ground cardamom, and 1/4 cup of garam masala, allspice, or nutmeg) together in a small bowl. Gently fold the mixture into the whipped cream until combined. The sauce should have the consistency of thick cream. For a thicker sauce, use only 3/4 cup of buttermilk instead of heavy cream.
